sources: Census ACS 5-yr 2009/2014/2024 (B25064 median gross rent, B19013 median HH income, B25070 rent burden)
Census Building Permits Survey (BPS) — annual unit permits
meta.note: ACS cohorts are 3 snapshots (2009, 2014, 2024), not continuous annual series. FHFA HPI is annual continuous. Permits are annual 2020-2024.
